hooks.command: if [ -f context/project.md ]; then updated=$(grep -i 'last updated' context/project.md | head -1); if [ -n "$updated" ]; then echo "PDD context exists. $updated — check if anything has changed."; else echo "PDD context exists but has no Last updated date. Consider adding one."; fi; elif [ -d prompts/ ] || [ -d context/ ]; then echo "PDD project detected but context/project.md is missing. Run /project:pdd-context to create it."; fi
